name: House Conservatives
subject: Our plan to lower your taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

**Affordable. Simple. Competitive.**

This is our goal, to reform our tax code so it's just that.

**Affordable:** your taxes are too high. Our plan cuts tax rates for all income levels, letting you keep more of your paycheck.

**Simple:** instead of filing multiple forms, our plan will make it easy to file your taxes -- imagine just submitting one postcard-sized form!

**Competitive:** our plan lowers tax rates for small businesses. This will make America more competitive and pave the way for more jobs and a stronger economy.

**So Friend, are you on board? [Let us know if you support our tax plan >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzA3NDgwNjIS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMzEwNzcwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We work for you. You elected Republicans to the House majority to pursue a broad agenda of conservative reforms, and with your support, we will get this done.

Thank you,

House Conservatives

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: ② Senate Republicans we know we can defeat
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c616b/24c69fd9/960c9c5e/189ddd8b/2386804121/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact&source=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact")
---

Peter,

How did Dean Heller and Jeff Flake wind up "On Notice"?

They voted to defund Planned Parenthood.

They voted to repeal Obamacare with no replacement in sight. In fact, Heller was the deciding vote to move one shoddy repeal bill forward just in July.

And they're the two most vulnerable Republican senators -- meaning we're confident that if we work hard, we can oust them next year.

**[Americans deserve better than to be represented by people like this. Donate $3 to help defeat Heller and Flake and replace them with pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c616b/24c69fd9/960c9c5e/189ddd84/2386804121/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170922_email_HellerFlakeTrumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Americans+deserve+better+than+to+be+repr&utm_campaign=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact&source=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact")**

Despite the fact that Americans overwhelmingly oppose Republican proposals to repeal Obamacare, Heller and Flake are _still_ determined to make it happen. Flake is expected to support it, and Heller's so supportive of taking health care from millions that _he put his name on it._

But that's par for the course for two senators more concerned about playing politics with our rights than protecting them.

We've already endorsed Jacky Rosen to take on Dean Heller in Nevada. And we are determined to recruit a candidate in Arizona to defeat Jeff Flake.

**Donate $3 to help defeat Heller and Flake -- because Americans deserve better than these two Republicans and their dangerous agenda:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Replace-Heller-Flake](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c616b/24c69fd9/960c9c5e/189ddd85/2386804121/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170922_email_HellerFlakeTrumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReplaceHellerFla&utm_campaign=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact&source=WQEFE947N_digital_email_20170925_HellerFlakeTcare_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: ISOLATED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Are they really this FOOLISH? |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

The fake news keeps saying, "President Trump is isolated."

...They say I'm isolated by lobbyists, corporations, grandstanding politicians, and Hollywood.

GOOD! _I don 't want them_. All I ever want is the support and love from the AMERICAN PEOPLE who've been betrayed by a weak and self-serving political class.

We're coming up on our end-of-quarter deadline and the media will be waiting to see if the American people have walked away from our movement. With your help, our numbers will show THE WORLD that the people are still fighting to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: Before Saturday's quarterly deadline:
body:
Help Democrats win all over the country.
---
**Saturday is our end-of-quarter deadline. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to help Democrats compete and win.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523434/4067b0a/39ec90865/7e63fd97/1277087041/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170926_tp_nd&source=em_20170926_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170926_tp_nd")**
**
Since he took office in January, Donald Trump and congressional Republicans have relentlessly tried to strip affordable health care from millions of Americans.

And every time they've tried, you've shown up to stop them, Derek. At town halls, on the phones, and in front of their offices, grassroots supporters like you have done everything you could to stand in their way -- not for the sake of winning a political fight, but because it was what we had to do.

We are the only ones who can stop Trump's agenda. That's why we're counting on you to pitch in $3 or more ahead of Saturday's end-of-quarter deadline.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We can't let up on health care just yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **The Graham-Cassidy ACA repeal guts Medicaid and would hurt seniors, kids, and people with disabilities and pre-existing conditions. We 're going to fight this tooth and nail, because it's bad for Virginia and bad for the country. Add your name if you agree: **

**[ADD MY NAME](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cg7wzeov0OgyKb4AxJmVu1IIH6EW8nty)**
---

Two months ago, millions of Americans breathed a sigh of relief as my colleagues and I narrowly defeated a dangerous repeal of the Affordable Care Act. We won that fight by a single vote, but it felt like we had turned a corner, and we would soon begin bipartisan efforts to reform and improve our current health care system. But here we are, 61 days later, and access to health care for millions of Americans is at risk all over again, thanks to the Graham-Cassidy bill.

GOP leaders have put a stop to productive bipartisan efforts so they can try to force an extreme bill through a rushed and secretive process. They're trying to ram this through before the Congressional Budget Office even has time to review the bill and provide estimates about its effects on health insurance. (Remember, the CBO found the last GOP repeal bill would rip coverage away from 32 million Americans.) **What we do know, even without a CBO score, is that \-- just like under past repeal bills -- millions of Americans will lose coverage they desperately need under this proposal. [This is unacceptable and downright cruel to American families -- add your name if you agree. ](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XXvkrwqQ7aOCkS6G7cid2FIIH6EW8nty)**

Here's what else we know about Graham-Cassidy: It lets states waive protections for maternity and newborn care, preventive care, treatment for mental health and substance use disorders, pediatric care, and countless other critical needs. Bottom line: Graham-Cassidy hurts millions of Americans -- especially kids, seniors, and those with pre-existing conditions -- and raises costs.

**Nearly every major health care organization in America is opposed to Graham-Cassidy -- not to mention patients and doctors. Our constituents are loud and clear on this issue. You've made your voices heard time and again as the GOP has tried over and over to strip health care from those who need it most. Now, we're facing another big fight.**

**[Sign my petition today to say you're for bipartisan, common-sense health care fixes, not a disastrous repeal and removal of coverage from millions of Americans.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8OaiqVa0FBajjH7DY5ayFFIIH6EW8nty)**

Thank you for your continued support.

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=R%2Bo7WEMfyEqTPCjwpRIIVVIIH6EW8nty)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YBPbm7aLOcereFHEsHAWI1IIH6EW8nty).
---

name: John Kasich
subject: We can do better
body:
Did you hear the latest breaking news? Senate Republican leaders
pulled the Graham-Cassidy bill and cancelled the vote when enough
Republicans pledged to vote against it.

Peter, did you hear the latest
breaking news?

Senate Republican leaders pulled
the Graham-Cassidy bill and cancelled the vote when enough
Republicans pledged to vote against it.

Let's be very clear on this:
Obamacare needs replaced with substantial fixes but putting in
place lasting reforms will require a bipartisan process.

This fight is not over because
whether we like it or not, Obamacare needs repaired and replaced
as soon as possible before it collapses.

Peter, we have a critical

help.

Please consider chipping in $10,

doing to help us get this important message out. America can do
better!

name: The White House
subject: Giving Our Children a Pathway to Success
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4acdbeafcf2051fc7f2342dc83fb22c7be257266d84dcff1aa0cfc5c0aad45fdc5ef9c6cd62087f6df1d539ec137baaac2

Hurricane Maria

The top priority of the federal government in regard to Hurricane Maria is to provide life, safety, and life sustaining resources to Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. FEMA and its federal partners continue to conduct 24-hour operations, aggressively conducting search and rescue operations, bringing additional essential commodities to the islands, and restoring power at hospitals, ports, airports, and other critical facilities. Find
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a9763856d9b0312316a9c7893b5dd1a00221126f02d812ca0e10b0de0892b627ea5c4468c01c90e156edb8b9a481ccb7d
up-to-date information on the response to
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a6af92361345233d496056d357a0b440b96e76bdfbb416deb17d7a65d9e7225b4a20369e5d8b509e420b6f1283ea37492
Puerto Rico and the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a3f385ee279267b5beabfb7876fa8af32309e2f0816a430fc730aa05c9a169a02ca7ec3c583eef583ee9ae41ec4eec7a0
U.S. Virgin Islands, how to help, and how to search for loved ones. You can also
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4aafd1eeaf531bc7080198a3b7d5bd5be46b56481e0cad4fd6f91020b7f8d230ebe62cdfb35142223614513b7bb84ebf39
apply for assistance.

Expanding Access to High-Quality STEM and Computer Science Education

Yesterday, joined by over 50 students, President Trump signed a Presidential Memorandum expanding access to high-quality STEM and Computer Science education to K-12 students. Also in attendance were Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos, Secretary of Labor Alex Acosta, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump, as well as several congressional representatives. This Memorandum establishes STEM education as one of the Department of Education’s priorities and establishes a goal of devoting at least $200 million per year in grant funds towards this priority.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4ab52e5907238bbe812cf02fb724972e53fa0424ab40d4ed8251ff94c394e35797c2940af2f57dc9505175de5ffbf5c0c0
Read more

First Lady at Invictus Games

First Lady Melania Trump made her first solo international trip as First Lady to the Invictus Games in Toronto. A Presidential delegation of about 100 athletes participated in the games - an international, multi-sport event founded by Prince Harry of Wales, where wounded armed service members and veterans compete in various sporting events. The event pays tribute to the fighting spirit of the men and women who have given so much for their country, sacrificing their lives to keep us safe. “You have given so much for your country. You truly are our heroes,” said First Lady Melania Trump to the athletes representing the United States. “Take that fighting spirit that I know you have and bring home the gold.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a3f4d255061e6c449753dbda44a4b94de889a3446a0fb413384107b8ffda0638d4bc3f6e0a720d793abcf9b46ed384196
Watch the video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump signs a Presidential Memorandum Expanding Access to High Quality STEM and Computer Science Education | September 25, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

This morning, the President will meet with bipartisan members of the House Committee on Ways and Means, followed by a briefing on hurricane recovery efforts. Later, President Trump will welcome President Mariano Rajoy of Spain to the White House.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a27d75bbad2517974623b963031f5a4d987a101ff3b9f09c49ac6de7844b0c27371dcdf752d4ed2a495cb2ce051d36450
Watch the joint press conference in the Rose Garden live at 1:45pm ET. Vice President Pence will travel to the U.S. Capitol to participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch and hold a series of meetings with lawmakers. Later in the day, the Vice President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for US Ambassador to Canada Kelly Knight Craft.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4ad835141041986b6f3b46ae20ce965fcc3a26acd5e09716d30057db550c0bec677052ec2248c2f4b72e1cce54103c5746
Watch live at 5:00pm ET .

Coming Up

Tomorrow, the President will travel to Indiana to promote the Administration’s tax reform agenda.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=68a7e552ba228b4a277e948c3700815fa8cb3e8573ce0711653cd4eba3cdc8c5bc1295c5d6cad23640da8e75175e0f5ce147f7da70b397d6
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

| | | Peter,

Sunday night, Senate Republicans released a revised version of the Graham-Cassidy bill -- legislation that, if passed, would repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and it's worse than before. The changes they made go **_even further_** to weaken protections for Americans living with pre-existing conditions by making it easier for insurance companies to deny coverage and discriminate against them.

Joe's made his position clear before, and he's doing it again: He's **100% opposed** to any bill that would send premiums through the roof, gut Medicaid, and strip millions of their health care. _Period._

But he needs to know you're with him.

**Let us know: Do you support Senate Republicans' revised Graham-Cassidy bill -- which goes even further to deprive people of care?**

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: From the sham commission to dark money
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

First of all, I want to say how grateful I am to everyone who stepped
up with a contribution to help mark our six-month anniversary.

We’re doing terrific things together through LegitAction, and it’s
wonderful to see how many people are excited to be a part of it.

But the legitimacy crisis we face is only growing -- and we face an
important financial deadline when the quarter ends at the end of the
month.

So I’m setting an ambitious goal. Let’s raise an additional 500
contributions to LegitAction before the end of the third quarter of
2017 arrives -- this Saturday.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/928?t=1002&akid=286%2E356062%2EVCbiL0 ]Make a contribution of $3 today to help raise an additional
500 contributions before the quarter ends Saturday at midnight.

The legitimacy crisis is growing all around us:

* From the sham Trump-Pence election commission searching for ways
to take away voting rights
* To state legislators undermining the push for the national popular
vote
* To anti-democratic Supreme Court rulings decided by a justice with
no right to be on the Court
* To the dark money that continues to pour into our elections
virtually unchecked.

We can keep making progress for democratic legitimacy in the face of
these threats if we keep standing together -- starting by reaching
this fundraising goal by Saturday at midnight.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/928?t=1003&akid=286%2E356062%2EVCbiL0 ]Help reach an additional 500 contributions to LegitAction before
the quarter ends Saturday at midnight. Contribute $3 today.

I’m proud of what we’ve done together in our first six months as
LegitAction. If we stay united, we can turn this crisis into strong,
vibrant democratic action.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

body:

| | | | | | | Peter,

The fake news keeps saying, "President Trump is isolated."

...They say I'm isolated by lobbyists, corporations, grandstanding politicians, and Hollywood.

GOOD! _I don 't want them_. All I ever want is the support and love from the AMERICAN PEOPLE who've been betrayed by a weak and self-serving political class.

We're coming up on our end-of-quarter deadline and the media will be waiting to see if the American people have walked away from our movement. With your help, our numbers will show THE WORLD that the people are still fighting to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! ...And that's even with self-serving politicians obstructing our agenda.

Peter, I was proud to go to the U.N. and declare before the world that for the first time in decades, America will look out for America's interests FIRST.

I didn't run for president to be a puppet for the global political class. I ran to be a champion for the American people.

**The only support I will ever care about is from American patriots like you.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: I'm coming to you directly, Derek
body:
Help Democrats win all over the country.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before Saturday's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b52a/293335157/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")**

Lately, I've been thinking about what can happen in a year's time, Derek.

Not just the past year, when your commitment to resisting the GOP's dangerous agenda and holding Donald Trump accountable has made me so proud to be a Democrat. I'm also talking about the year ahead leading up to the critical midterm elections.

A lot will happen between then and now -- including the statewide elections in Virginia and New Jersey coming up in just 42 days.

It's up to us to support Democrats up and down the ballot in tough off-year races and in 2018. It's up to us to lay the groundwork for our 50-state strategy so that we can take back the House in 2018. It's up to us to defeat the Republicans' health care repeal effort every time it comes back from the dead.

Democrats have a lot to get done. That's why I'm coming to you directly, Derek.

Let this end-of-quarter deadline be a moment we can look back on as a turning point. Pitch in $3 or more to support Democrats before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b52b/293335157/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b529/293335157/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b536/293335157/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b537/293335157/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b534/293335157/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd")
** Thanks,

Keith

Deputy Chair

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b532/293335157/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523442/4067b0a/39da91081/7e63b530/293335157/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170926_ke_nd&source=em_20170926_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170926_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Kaine
subject: Derek, did you see this polling update?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey -- we wanted to make sure you saw this important note from Tim's campaign manager last week. The fact is, Tim is facing a tough race, and we need to build up the grassroots movement behind him if we want to keep him in the Senate.

**There are just a few days left until the first big FEC deadline of our reelection campaign, and we've set an ambitious goal of raising $70,000. We can't do this without you -- will you step up and pitch in right now?**

**[https://www.timkaine.com/september-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=q7Eq6ktruk11khkKClfYBAs44%2Fe6mm5Y)**

Thank you so much.

\- Team Kaine _\---------- Forwarded message ----------_
From: **Team Kaine** (info@timkaine.com)
Subject: New poll numbers >>

|
---
| **New poll numbers from Suffolk University show a tough race.**
**Don 't let Virginia lose a key voice in the Senate. [Pitch in now >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=33KtV9W6qBo52ywxus6ICdTr%2B1Od59T1)**

**[DONATE](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hpa1%2BTQGeT2GzJfnldg4Z9Tr%2B1Od59T1)**
---

Hey -- A new poll came out earlier this week, and it gave me a jolt -- so I wanted to share it with our key supporters:

**Only 43% of poll respondents said that Tim Kaine should be reelected to the Senate, compared to 46% who said he shouldn 't be. 11% were undecided.**

We know that Tim is a much-needed progressive voice in the Senate who is committed to putting Virginians first -- and we really can't afford to lose his leadership in Congress.**But it's clear we have a tough race on our hands -- please make a donation to help us reach more voters and get ready to win this race.**

_Because you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9h8SyPCZ2xVErH0mrWUxcws44%2Fe6mm5Y)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=93Odb4Hr3E5tGGbR6kLPadTr%2B1Od59T1)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BhvMr%2BGWn3MXXj7j0uQiw9Tr%2B1Od59T1)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=H3EWs0PSsS%2B5DGdxEVE2ftTr%2B1Od59T1)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=T8cyhtrlJSaqOOBn3ULmhdTr%2B1Od59T1)**
The good news is that this is just one poll -- we've seen others that show Tim in a stronger position -- and right now, a majority of Virginians approve of Tim's work. But we know from past elections that approval doesn't always result in a win: In August of 2013, Virginia Senator Mark Warner had even higher approval ratings than Tim does -- _and he still nearly lost his 2014 election._ We can't take anything for granted.

**This campaign isn't a sprint, it's a marathon. That means we need to be fighting for Tim every single day, the same way he 's fighting for Virginians in the Senate. [We can't let up -- can you spare a few dollars to make sure Tim has the sustained support he needs to win reelection?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CiFA1hSvZZnWOL8dI3kFogs44%2Fe6mm5Y)**

[**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8v%2BSbEG3AN5IULJdXyWx3dTr%2B1Od59T1)
---

Tim is standing strong in the Senate against the worst elements of Donald Trump and Republicans' dangerous agenda. But if we're not vigilant, the GOP and right-wing special interests could replace him with an extremist like Corey Stewart, a "mini-Trump" who will simply act as a rubber stamp for that agenda.

**[We're building a massive grassroots campaign to make sure Tim remains our senator. Will you pitch in now to join us?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kBcoy3y8h33Oz3dXAqOrxdTr%2B1Od59T1)**

Thank you for your support,

Keren

Keren Charles Dongo, Team Kaine Campaign Manager
| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
There are competitive races, and then there are races like ours. |
---

| | Peter,

**We 're just four days away from the end of the financial quarter -- and we're still 400 donors from hitting our goal.**

We want to be honest with you; we set a high goal for ourselves. But that's because we know that corporate special interest groups are going to throw everything -- and we mean _everything_ \-- at Joe to defeat him.

They know Joe is more interested in fighting for hardworking Hoosier families than lining the pockets of billionaires. But because this race is a true toss-up, special interest groups think they have a chance to elect someone who will put their goals before the needs of hardworking Hoosiers.

**When you 're going up against the deep pockets of dark money, every dollar and grassroots donor counts -- especially with our end-of-quarter deadline coming up this week.** When our report for the quarter comes out, we need to match every single penny from the other side's deep pockets if we're going to keep fighting.

That's why, for the first time in this campaign, we have the opportunity for our double match program. **EVERY** contribution will be doubled if we can unlock it. Each grassroots dollar will go _twice_ as far.

**We need to send a message: Indiana 's Senate seat is not for sale. Help us hit our goal and unlock our match!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

There's just one catch: we don't have a lot of time left. We need to unlock this match first, and that means having at least 400 additional donors by Saturday. If we can't get there? The match is gone.

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Restore the VRA
body:
Voting is one of the greatest equalizers we have. Regardless of who you are
#
Friends,
Voting is one of the greatest equalizers we have. Regardless of who you are or what you look like, we are all equal. Because of that we must continue to protect and expand access to the ballot box. Yet, with the 2013 Supreme Court decision in _Shelby County v. Holder_ , our right to vote is under a renewed assault.
Voter ID laws, restrictions on same-day registration and early voting, gerrymandering, aggressive purges of voter rolls, and a multitude of other efforts have made voting more difficult for African-Americans, Latinos, students, and many others. **Our Revolution is working to pass the Automatic Voter Registration Act (H.R. 2840) as part of the People's Platform.[Add your name to our petition to guarantee that every eligible person age 18 and up is automatically registered to vote.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde54/946832918/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/automatic-voter-registration?source=em170926-full")**
Our vote is how we hold our elected officials accountable to the policies we want to see passed. It is how we express our opinions in the public space. Policies pushing voter access remain just as important now as they were during the Civil Rights era.
**[Automatic Voter Registration will add millions of new voters to the rolls, ensuring that people are not barred from voting for want of registering on time. Add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass H.R. 2840, the Automatic Voter Registration Act.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde54/946832918/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/automatic-voter-registration?source=em170926-full")**
The struggle will always continue, but through the power of voting we have the opportunity and responsibility to create a nation that values clean water, fresh air, safe neighborhoods, and quality education for everyone.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde54/946832918/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/automatic-voter-registration?source=em170926-full")**
**[P.S. After you've signed our petition, make sure your voter registration is accurate and encourage your friends and family to check their registration as well.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde57/946832918/VEsC/ "https://www.rockthevote.com/register-to-vote/?source=em170926-ourrev")**

603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde51/946832918/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af64/bed43eb/2978349/75ffde50/946832918/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). name: Roy Cooper
subject: Climate action that Trump can't stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
When President Trump pulled out of the Paris Agreement, I knew we couldn't just sit around and let our progress on climate waste away. .
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203306/2fde7c66/4430fa2b/156941af/2529156014/VEsH/ "https://givegreenstates.org/page/greenstorm8/")
---
Friend,

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris Agreement, I knew we couldn't just sit around and let our progress on climate waste away.

In the days and weeks that followed, folks across the U.S. sprang to action. It showed the country something important -- it showed just how critical a role governors can play in being stewards for a healthy and clean environment.

That's why electing Ralph Northam as the next governor of Virginia is so important. This race will determine whether states advance pro-environment policy in spite of the Trump administration - or join him. We need to help Ralph Northam today as he is part of a nationwide Greenstorm of support.

**[We can't win without building a movement: Chip in directly to Northam, to help us meet our goal of $20,000 in the next 48 hours.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203306/2fde7c66/4430fa2b/156941af/2529156014/VEsE/ "https://givegreenstates.org/page/greenstorm8/")**

By pitching in for this race together in the next 48 hours, we can elect an environmental ally who will protect the air we breathe, the water we drink, and the public lands we cherish.

In a race like this, grassroots money goes so far - and the election outcomes can make real change even while Republican-controlled Washington fails to act on climate.

All you need to do is look at our win for governor of North Carolina last year to see how close these races can be -- and the impact a win can have.

In Virginia, despite Republican control of the legislature, Lieutenant Governor Northam and Governor McAuliffe have led the charge in reducing carbon emissions and bolstering clean energy infrastructure. Even $5 will help Northam get his message out in this last month of the campaign and protect the progress he and Governor McAuliffe have made.

Please, join the most significant show of grassroots support of the year today to counter Big Polluter money interfering in the final month of these elections.

**[Donate to Ralph Northam today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203306/2fde7c66/4430fa2b/156941af/2529156014/VEsF/ "https://givegreenstates.org/page/greenstorm8/")**

Let's empower states to fight climate change. Together, we will win in November.

Thank you,

Roy Cooper
Governor of North Carolina | | [**Donate ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203306/2fde7c66/4430fa2b/156941af/2529156014/VEsC/ "https://givegreenstates.org/page/greenstorm8/")

body:
| | **BREAKING NEWS: Senate will not vote on Graham-Cassidy!**

Our health care is safe for this week, but the fight goes on.

**[Donate now to support Senate Democrats and hold the line against the Trump agenda>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bde/70cdc2ba/46a69200/397db57/2332605726/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-sep17?refcode=em092617&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Donate+now+to+support+Senate+Democrats+a&utm_campaign=em092617&source=em092617")**
---
The latest threat to America's health care is over. Senate Republicans have announced that the Senate will not vote on Obamacare this week!

Millions of Americans can rest easy for now, knowing that the Senate will not vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and take away their health care this week.

But we cannot rest on our laurels. Republicans are still on a crusade to repeal the ACA, and this latest defeat will not stop them from trying again.

[**We need to make it clear that we are not slowing down in this fight to protect Americans ' health care and are ready to ramp up our activism to keep our democracy strong against all efforts to undermine it. Will you recommit to this mission and help now? **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bde/70cdc2ba/46a69200/397db54/2332605726/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-sep17?refcode=em092617&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+make+it+clear+that+we+are+not&utm_campaign=em092617&source=em092617")

As Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Chris is leading the charge to make sure the fate of health care for millions of Americans will no longer be able to be held hostage to one GOP swing vote -- _like it was this week!_

[**Please pitch in to help him in this fight and stand with Senate Democrats ' efforts to hold the line against this radical Republican agenda going forward.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bde/70cdc2ba/46a69200/397db55/2332605726/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-sep17?refcode=em092617&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+pitch+in+to+help+him+in+this+figh&utm_campaign=em092617&source=em092617")

As long as Donald Trump is in the White House and Republicans control the Senate and the House, we must stay vigilant every day and work tirelessly to defend our democracy.

Thank you for your continued activism,

Team Van Hollen

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
